releaseNotes: Fixes Codex history retention across model switches — sync now runs synchronously in apply_codex (1-3s wait) instead of launcher pre-launch, so history retag fires regardless of how Codex is opened (Start menu, shortcut, or our Open button). Adds Windows native support for Hermes Agent — detects %LOCALAPPDATA%\hermes installation from official irm install.ps1 installer.
